notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Heliot Ramos reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Hyeseong Kim.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Drew Gilbert. Kyle Tucker scores. Throwing error by center fielder Drew Gilbert.

notableEvents.label: Shohei Ohtani GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Shohei Ohtani grounds into a double play, second baseman Luis Arraez to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Alex Freeland out at 2nd. Shohei Ohtani out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Heliot Ramos reached on error
